qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Radiology and Imaging Technology (2 years course)
qualification.details: Diploma in Radiology and Imaging Technology (2 years course)

salary_details.details: Rs. 700 Per Day (for 18 days per month)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Kanchipuram Radiographer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Kanchipuram Radiographer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Radiographer post is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Radiographer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma in Radiology and Imaging Technology, which is a 2-year course, to be eligible for the Radiographer position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Radiographer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Radiographer post will receive a salary of Rs. 700 per day, calculated for approximately 18 days in a month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Radiographer post is 50 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DHS Kanchipuram Radiographer job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Radiographer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Radiographer post primarily involves Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on the verification of their submitted documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job offered is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Radiographer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Radiographer in the District Health Society Kanchipuram.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job is located in Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu, with a pincode of 631501.
